sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الْكَبْسَةُ مِنَ الْأَطْبَاقِ الرَّئِيسِيَّةِ الْمَشْهُورَةِ فِي مِنْطَقَةِ الْخَلِيجِ، وَتَتَمَيَّزُ بِتَنَوُّعِ نَكْهَاتِهَا وَطَرِيقَةِ طَهْيِهَا الْفَرِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kabsa je jedno od poznatih glavnih jela u regiji Zaljeva, a odlikuje se raznolikošću okusa i jedinstvenim načinom pripreme.
sentences.translationEn: Kabsa is one of the famous main dishes in the Gulf region, characterized by its diverse flavors and unique cooking method.

sentences.arabic: يَبْدَأُ التَّحْضِيرُ بِتَحْمِيصِ الْبَصَلِ وَالثُّومِ مَعَ مَزِيجٍ مِنَ الْبُهَارَاتِ الصَّحِيحَةِ مِثْلِ الْقِرْفَةِ وَاللُّومِي وَالْهَيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Priprema počinje dinstanjem luka i bijelog luka sa mješavinom cijelih začina poput cimeta, sušenog limuna i kardamoma.
sentences.translationEn: Preparation begins by sautéing onions and garlic with a mixture of whole spices such as cinnamon, dried lime, and cardamom.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، يُضَافُ اللَّحْمُ أَوْ الدَّجَاجُ لِيَنْضَجَ مَعَ الطَّمَاطِمِ وَالْمَاءِ حَتَّى يَمْتَصَّ جَمِيعَ النَّكْهَاتِ الْعَطِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga se dodaje meso ili piletina da se krčka s paradajzom i vodom dok ne upije sve aromatične ukuse.
sentences.translationEn: After that, meat or chicken is added to cook with tomatoes and water until it absorbs all the fragrant flavors.

sentences.arabic: يُوضَعُ الْأُرْزُ طَوِيلُ الْحَبَّةِ فَوْقَ الْمَرَقِ، وَيُتْرَكُ عَلَى نَارٍ هَادِئَةٍ جِدّاً حَتَّى يَتَشَرَّبَ السَّوَائِلَ وَيُصْبِحَ نَثْرِيّاً وَلَذِيذاً.
sentences.translation: Riža dugog zrna stavlja se preko temeljca i ostavlja na vrlo laganoj vatri dok ne upije tečnost i postane rastresita i ukusna.
sentences.translationEn: Long-grain rice is placed over the broth and left on a very low heat until it absorbs the liquids and becomes fluffy and delicious.

sentences.arabic: وَأَخِيراً، يُزَيَّنُ الطَّبَقُ بِاللَّوْزِ الْمُحَمَّصِ وَالزَّبِيبِ، وَيُقَدَّمُ مَعَ سَلَطَةِ الدَّقُّوسِ الْحَارَّةِ لِإِضْفَاءِ لَمْسَةٍ نِهَائِيَّةٍ رَائِعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju se jelo ukrašava pečenim bademima i grožđicama, te se poslužuje uz ljutu 'Daqqus' salatu kako bi se dodao završni vrhunski dodir.
sentences.translationEn: Finally, the dish is garnished with roasted almonds and raisins and served with hot 'Daqqus' sauce to add a wonderful final touch.
